classObjective: Graph the image of a figure after a glide reflection or other composition of transformations on the coordinate plane.
workedExamples: 13-4, Example 1 — Graph the Image of a Figure Under a Glide Reflection
13-4, Example 2 — Graph the Image of a Figure Under a Composition of Transformations
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: glide reflection (translation then reflection); composition order matters; multiple transformation sequences
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice graphing compositions of transformations including glide reflections
independentPractice: Practice problems graphing figures after glide reflections and other composition sequences
assessment: Exit ticket: perform a glide reflection on a figure: first translate <3, 0>, then reflect over the x-axis
capReflection: Why does the order of transformations matter in a composition?
